title: Webhook
description: This schema defines webhook for receiving events from OpenMetadata.

entityName.description: Unique name of the application receiving webhook events.

receivers.description: List of receivers to send mail to

endpoint.description: Endpoint to receive the webhook events over POST requests.

headers.description: Custom headers to be sent with the webhook request.

queryParams.description: Query parameters to be added to the webhook request URL.

httpMethod.description: HTTP operation to send the webhook request. Supports POST or PUT.

authType.description: Authentication configuration for the webhook. If not specified, the webhook will be sent without authentication.
authType.title: Authentication Configuration Type
